title: Macro Minute: Should Investors Chase Trump Trades?

42 macro so today's key macro question
is should investors chase the aggressive
pressing in of trump trades our answers
are they should if they or their clients
want to retire on time and comfortably
today just like every other day in
investing is not the time to play
politics with your or your client's
money rather today is an opportunity to
listen to the market and participate in
what the market is trying to price in
the last thing you should do today is
take the other side of the most powerful
force in investing which is momentum
because your preferred candidate lost
the election process didn't drag on as
long as your short positions intended or
some other misguided reason like that
I've remarked on several occasions this
year that I don't think there has been a
single macro research for provider that
has been more right on the US economy or
more right across as many factors within
and across as many asset classes as 42
macro has been over the past three years

rising so by crypto and gold we don't
just tell you hey the US economy remains
resilient so buy stocks and credit we
tell our clients exactly which stocks
credit crypto rates currencies and
commodities to buy and which to sell and

recommendations via our proven kol
construction process and discretionary
management overlay AKA Dr Mo systems is

clients are experiencing for the third
year in a row is something we are
immensely proud of cheers to our
systematic investing Revolution my
friends transitioning to our 42 macro
dashboard as always a wrap up with the
question from our community this one's
regarding gold says uh thank you any
thoughts on why you think gold is
selling off given the potential deficit
impact of the Trump president uh that's
a pretty easy one to field uh we have
the uh biggest sharpest increases in uh
nominal real interest rates uh since
going back to September of 2022 we also
have the largest and sharpest increase
in the US dollar since going back to
September of 2022 uh there's been a a
perfect flow trade out of treasuries uh
and into gold but now it's starting to
catch up the the the movement the speed
of the movement that we're seeing in the
treasury market in the currency Market
is now causing some investors to book
gains in Gold so just let it play out uh
you know we still have maintained our

again it doesn't mean gold has to go up
every day every week every month
obviously he can respond to and catch
